title: Data Boundary Assertion v0.2
$comment: DBA is architecturally distinct from AuthZEN (OpenID) and OPA/Rego. DBA is a portable pre-signed contract that travels with a transaction; AuthZEN and OPA are runtime APIs/engines requiring live connectivity. See docs/standards-alignment.md for the full comparison.

assertion_id.description: Unique identifier for this data boundary assertion.

issuer.description: Identity of the party issuing the data governance terms.

subject_id.description: Identifier of the data artifact being governed. Partial mapping to AuthZEN 'resource' object.

subject_type.description: Type of the data artifact. Examples: request, response, prompt, completion, artifact.

data_classes.description: Data sensitivity classifications that apply to this artifact. Examples: pii, financial, confidential, customer_content.

permitted_operations.description: Operations permitted on this data artifact. Partial mapping to AuthZEN 'action' type. Machine-enforceable: if the attempted operation is not in this list, the result MUST be deny (ERR_DBA_OPERATION_NOT_ALLOWED). Examples: store, transform, infer, forward, audit_export.

boundary_constraints.description: Data governance constraints for this artifact. These fields encode GDPR, data residency, and data processing agreement obligations in machine-readable form.

allowed_regions.description: Regions where processing is permitted. ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes or named regions (e.g., EU, US-EAST). If set and transaction region is not in this list, result MUST be deny (ERR_DBA_REGION_NOT_ALLOWED).

max_retention_hours.description: Maximum hours the data may be retained. If the requested retention duration exceeds this, result MUST be deny (ERR_DBA_RETENTION_EXCEEDED).

redaction_required.description: Field names that must be redacted before the data may leave this boundary. If any of these fields are still present in the transaction's visible_fields, result MUST be deny (ERR_DBA_REDACTION_REQUIRED).

egress_allowed.description: Whether the data may cross an organizational boundary. If false and cross_org_transfer=true in the transaction, result MUST be deny (ERR_DBA_EGRESS_BLOCKED).

audit_required.description: If true, the enforcement point MUST emit audit evidence for this assertion evaluation.
